---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.18.0]
- npm version: [e.g. 10.x]
- ThinkGrove version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- AI Provider: [e.g. mock, minimax, openai]

## Additional Context

Logs, stack traces, or anything else that helps.
